mapper.sql: select alert_id, alert_no, rule_id, rule_name, rule_type, alert_level, alert_type, proj_id, proj_no, proj_name, node_id, node_name, category_id, category_name, total_budget, actual_cost, budget_balance, current_value, threshold_value, trigger_bill_type, trigger_bill_id, trigger_bill_no, trigger_amount, condition_desc, status, handler, handle_time, handle_remark, closed_by, closed_time, close_remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from proj_alert_record
mapper.insert: insert into proj_alert_record(alert_no, rule_id, rule_name, rule_type, alert_level, alert_type, proj_id, proj_no, proj_name, node_id, node_name, category_id, category_name, total_budget, actual_cost, budget_balance, current_value, threshold_value, trigger_bill_type, trigger_bill_id, trigger_bill_no, trigger_amount, condition_desc, status, create_by, create_time) values(#{alertNo}, #{ruleId}, #{ruleName}, #{ruleType}, #{alertLevel}, #{alertType}, #{projId}, #{projNo}, #{projName}, #{nodeId}, #{nodeName}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{totalBudget}, #{actualCost}, #{budgetBalance}, #{currentValue}, #{thresholdValue}, #{triggerBillType}, #{triggerBillId}, #{triggerBillNo}, #{triggerAmount}, #{conditionDesc}, #{status}, #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update proj_alert_record set status = #{status}, handler = #{handler}, handle_time = #{handleTime}, handle_remark = #{handleRemark}, closed_by = #{closedBy}, closed_time = #{closedTime}, close_remark = #{closeRemark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where alert_id = #{alertId}
mapper.select: select count(1) as totalCount, sum(case when status in ('0', '3') then 1 else 0 end) as activeCount, sum(case when alert_level = '3' and status in ('0', '3') then 1 else 0 end) as redCount, sum(case when alert_level = '2' and status in ('0', '3') then 1 else 0 end) as orangeCount, sum(case when alert_level = '1' and status in ('0', '3') then 1 else 0 end) as yellowCount, sum(case when date(create_time) = curdate() then 1 else 0 end) as todayCount from proj_alert_record

select p.proj_id as projId, p.proj_no as projNo, p.proj_name as projName, p.plan_start_date as planStartDate, p.plan_end_date as planEndDate, ifnull(p.total_budget, 0) as totalBudget, ifnull(p.actual_cost, 0) as actualCost, case when ifnull(p.total_budget, 0) = 0 then 0 else round(ifnull(p.actual_cost, 0) / p.total_budget * 100, 2) end as execRate, sum(case when a.status in ('0','3') and a.alert_level = '3' then 1 else 0 end) as redCount, sum(case when a.status in ('0','3') and a.alert_level = '2' then 1 else 0 end) as orangeCount, sum(case when a.status in ('0','3') and a.alert_level = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as yellowCount from proj_info p left join proj_alert_record a on a.proj_id = p.proj_id where p.del_flag = '0' group by p.proj_id, p.proj_no, p.proj_name, p.plan_start_date, p.plan_end_date, p.total_budget, p.actual_cost order by redCount desc, orangeCount desc, yellowCount desc, execRate desc

select
date_format(post_time, '%Y') date_format(post_time, '%Y-%m-%d') date_format(post_time, '%Y-%m')
as period, ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as postingAmount from cost_posting_record where 1 = 1 and proj_id = #{projId} group by
date_format(post_time, '%Y') date_format(post_time, '%Y-%m-%d') date_format(post_time, '%Y-%m')
order by period asc

select category_name as categoryName, ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as actualCost from cost_posting_record where 1 = 1 and proj_id = #{projId} group by category_id, category_name order by actualCost desc limit 8

select p.proj_id as projId, p.proj_no as projNo, p.proj_name as projName, p.plan_start_date as planStartDate, p.plan_end_date as planEndDate, ifnull(p.total_budget, 0) as totalBudget, ifnull(p.actual_cost, 0) as actualCost, case when ifnull(p.total_budget, 0) = 0 then 0 else round(ifnull(p.actual_cost, 0) / p.total_budget * 100, 2) end as execRate, count(a.alert_id) as activeAlertCount from proj_info p left join proj_alert_record a on a.proj_id = p.proj_id and a.status in ('0','3') where p.del_flag = '0' group by p.proj_id, p.proj_no, p.proj_name, p.plan_start_date, p.plan_end_date, p.total_budget, p.actual_cost order by execRate desc, activeAlertCount desc
